description: Kavach 2.0 scam pattern database - seeded from I4C and public domain sources

patterns.text: This is CBI calling. A case has been registered against your Aadhaar number. You must pay a fine immediately or face arrest.
Yeh CBI se bol rahe hain. Aapke Aadhaar pe ek case register hua hai. Turant fine pay karein warna arrest ho jaenge.
You are under digital arrest. Do not disconnect this video call. Any attempt to contact anyone will result in immediate physical arrest.
Aap digital arrest mein hain. Video call disconnect mat karein. Kisi ko bataaya toh turant arrest hoga.
మీ ఆధార్ నంబర్ పై కేసు నమోదైంది. వెంటనే జరిమానా చెల్లించండి లేకపోతే అరెస్ట్ అవుతారు.
உங்கள் ஆதார் எண்ணில் வழக்கு பதிவு செய்யப்பட்டுள்ளது. உடனடியாக அபராதம் செலுத்தவும் இல்லையெனில் கைது செய்யப்படுவீர்கள்.
Your KYC has expired. Your bank account will be frozen within 24 hours. Click this link to update immediately.
Aapka KYC expire ho gaya hai. 24 ghante mein aapka bank account freeze ho jaega. Abhi update karein.
RBI se bol rahe hain. Aapka account suspicious transaction ke liye flag hua hai. Verify karne ke liye OTP bhejein.
This is RBI. Your account has been flagged for suspicious activity. Share your OTP to verify your identity.
Congratulations! You have won ₹25,00,000 in the KBC lottery. Pay ₹5,000 processing fee to claim your prize.
Badhai ho! Aapne KBC lottery mein ₹25 lakh jeete hain. Prize claim karne ke liye ₹5,000 processing fee pay karein.
Your Aadhaar card has been used in money laundering. This is the Narcotics Department. Transfer ₹50,000 to secure account immediately.
Aapke Aadhaar card ka istemal money laundering mein hua hai. Yeh Narcotics Department se hai. ₹50,000 secure account mein transfer karein.
Work from home opportunity! Invest ₹10,000 and earn ₹1,00,000 per month. Limited seats available. Join now!
Ghar baithe kamayein! ₹10,000 invest karein aur ₹1 lakh mahina kamayein. Limited seats. Abhi join karein!
Kisi ko mat batana. Yeh confidential investigation hai. Agar kisi ko bataaya toh aapki family ko bhi arrest karenge.
Do not tell anyone about this call. This is a confidential investigation. If you inform anyone, your family will also be arrested.
ఇది పోలీస్ స్టేషన్ నుండి. మీ పేరు మీద ఒక FIR ఫైల్ అయింది. వెంటనే ₹30,000 చెల్లించండి.
இது போலீஸ் ஸ்டேஷனிலிருந்து. உங்கள் பெயரில் FIR பதிவு செய்யப்பட்டுள்ளது. உடனடியாக ₹30,000 செலுத்தவும்.
Sirf 10 minute hain aapke paas. Agar abhi payment nahi ki toh arrest warrant issue ho jaega. Jaldi karein!
You have only 10 minutes. If payment is not made now, an arrest warrant will be issued. Hurry!
Customs department se call hai. Aapke parcel mein drugs paaye gaye hain. Case register hone se bachne ke liye ₹2 lakh transfer karein.
This is customs. Drugs have been found in a parcel addressed to you. Transfer ₹2 lakhs to avoid case registration.
আপনার আধার কার্ড দিয়ে মানি লন্ডারিং হয়েছে। এটা CBI থেকে বলছি। ₹50,000 জমা দিন নাহলে গ্রেফতার হবেন।
Pre-approved loan of ₹5,00,000 for you! Just pay ₹3,000 processing charge to activate. Offer valid today only.
Aapke liye ₹5 lakh ka pre-approved loan hai! Sirf ₹3,000 processing charge pay karein. Aaj hi offer khatam.
